basic_details.job_title: Spices Board Trainee Analyst Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Spices Board Trainee Analyst Notification 2026 has been released on 19 June 2026 on the official website of the Spices Board. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the Spices Board Recruitment 2026 on a walk-in basis under Advt No. 01/2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor of Science Degree with Chemistry as one of the main subject or Bachelor degree in Chemistry, from a recognized university/Institute, or equivalent, Bachelors Degree in Microbiology, from a recognized University/Institute, or equivalent
qualification.details: Trainee Analyst (Chemistry): Bachelor of Science Degree with Chemistry as one of the main subject or Bachelor degree in Chemistry, from a recognized university/Institute, or equivalent. Trainee Analyst (Microbiology): Bachelors Degree in Microbiology, from a recognized University/Institute, or equivalent.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download Spices Board Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Spices Board Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Spices Board Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Spices Board Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Spices Board Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Trainee Analyst (Chemistry): Bachelor of Science Degree with Chemistry as one of the main subject or Bachelor degree in Chemistry, from a recognized university/Institute, or equivalent. Trainee Analyst (Microbiology): Bachelors Degree in Microbiology, from a recognized University/Institute, or equivalent.

content_sections.heading: Spices Board Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for Spices Board Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for Spices Board Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Trainee Analyst posts is scheduled for 15th July 2026. Candidates should report at the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Trainee Analyst post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Bachelor of Science Degree with Chemistry as a main subject or a Bachelor's degree in Chemistry or Microbiology from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Trainee Analyst position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Trainee Analyst posts is 30 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Trainee Analyst role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 20,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Trainee Analyst post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for the Trainee Analyst position at the Spices Board.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Spices Board Trainee Analyst recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in-test.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview for the Spices Board Recruitment 2026 going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held in Kandla, Gujarat, with the pincode 370201.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contractual job opportunity with the Spices Board.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and any other relevant certificates as mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for Spices Board Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Trainee Analyst posts is scheduled for 15th July 2026. Candidates should report at the venue on this date.
